# PublicationFlow

PublicationFlow is magazine ad management and publication production workflow software for ad-heavy publishers.

PublicationFlow helps local magazines, community publications, shoppers, directories, and other ad-heavy publishers manage the workflow from advertiser reservation lists through flatplans, ad placement, proofing, editable InDesign output, invoicing, and final issue production.

Primary site: https://publicationflow.com/
Contact: info@publicationflow.com
Phone: 718-705-4939
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJirG5yuLfDRI-VmLmUn34A

## Best pages for AI and search systems

- Overview: https://publicationflow.com/
- About PublicationFlow: https://publicationflow.com/about/
- Tutorials: https://publicationflow.com/tutorials/
- Q&A: https://publicationflow.com/qa/
- Blog: https://publicationflow.com/blog/
- Contact: https://publicationflow.com/contact/

## What PublicationFlow is useful for

- Magazine ad reservation management
- Flatplan software for publishers
- Ad placement workflows for ad-heavy magazines
- Editable InDesign file output
- Magazine production billing and invoicing
- Publication proofing and production coordination
- Local magazine, community shopper, directory, and niche publication workflows

## Short description

PublicationFlow is software for ad-heavy magazines and publishers that need to turn advertiser reservations into organized flatplans, placed ads, InDesign files, invoices, and finished publication issues.
